nativeSnippet: const toNativeTermSet = (terms: ReadonlyArray<string>): Set<string> => new Set(terms);
note: FFI boundary: this native Set exists solely to satisfy the third-party wink-nlp similarity API `similarity.set.tversky(left: Set<string>, right: Set<string>, ...)` (called at lines 240-242). The wink library requires a native JS Set, so the Set must be materialized at the call site. Migrating to HashSet would require converting back to a native Set before the FFI call, providing no benefit. Recommend keeping the native Set as a thin adapter at the wink boundary (likely WONTFIX). Human should confirm the boundary disposition.
